name: Chocolate-Amaretto Cheesecake (Make Ahead)
recipeInstructions:
From: Light and Easy Cooking Collection, Oxmoor House
You can substitute an 8-inch pan for this cheesecake recipe, if desired. The larger cheesecake will require only 45 to 50 minutes baking time.
1. Sprinkle chocolate wafer crumbs in the bottom of a 7-inch springform pan. Set aside.
2. In a food processor bowl, add cream cheese and the next seven ingredients (sugar, cocoa powder, flour, amaretto, vanilla extract, salt, egg). Process until smooth.
3. Add chocolate morsels to the mixture and process just until blended.
4. Slowly pour the mixture over the crumbs in the pan.
5. Bake at 300°F for 65 to 70 minutes or until the cheesecake is set. Let cool in the pan on a wire rack.
6. Cover and chill for at least 8 hours.
7. Remove the sides of the pan, and transfer the cheesecake to a serving platter. Garnish with chocolate curls if desired. Yield: 12 servings (about 200 calories per serving).
CHOCOLATE MINT CHEESECAKE: Substitute 1/4 cup crème de menthe for amaretto. Yield: 12 servings (about 197 calories per serving).
